evidence.excerpt: task_run_ledger id 214852 shows eval:a2a RUN_DELIVERED once on 2026-06-25; 2026-05-30 through 2026-06-25 are single-fire after the 2026-05-29 duplicate.
No 2026-06-25 raw counter_window block existed before this evaluation; without process-info, counter-derived rates cannot use the correct OTel accumulation denominator.
Local telemetry endpoints for process-info and grounding samples were unavailable on 2026-06-25, so grounding-phase-o remains no-data and cannot be interpreted as healthy distribution.

proposedAction.target: F192 eval cat runtime telemetry read path
proposedAction.rationale: Provide eval invocations an authenticated or otherwise server-trusted way to read process-info and grounding samples, or write those fields into raw eval evidence before the eval cat runs.
